jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Cyient
jsonLd.description:
Cyient, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cyient:
Cyient is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient!
